questions.title: Cosmic Color Palette
questions.context: Requirement THEME-01. This defines the foundation for all subsequent visual polish.

options.label: Deep Space
options.description: Deep purples, dark blues, neon cyan accents. Classic 'high-tech cosmic' feel.

options.label: Stellar Nursery
options.description: Magenta, indigo, gold accents. More vibrant and ethereal.

options.label: Void Ethereal
options.description: Near-black, soft violets, ghostly white accents. Minimalist and mysterious.

questions.title: Nebula Generation Method
questions.context: Requirement THEME-02. Replaces the static background.jpg with procedural art.

options.label: Radial Gradient Noise
options.description: Multi-layered radial gradients with simulated noise. Soft, gaseous, and high-performance.

options.label: Perlin Noise Cloud
options.description: True Perlin noise mapped to cosmic colors. More structured and organic, slightly more complex to implement.

options.label: Animated Particle Wash
options.description: A static base with a slow-moving, low-opacity particle layer. Adds depth and movement.

questions.title: Tween Cleanup Strategy
questions.context: Requirement ANIM-05. Prevents visual corruption when Bug entities are reused from the pool.

options.label: Phaser Tween Manager
options.description: Use this.scene.tweens.killTweensOf(this). The standard Phaser way; clean and reliable.

options.label: Explicit Tracking
options.description: Store active tweens in an array and stop them manually. More control, but more boilerplate.

options.label: Tween-specific tags
options.description: Use tags to target only animation tweens, leaving other system tweens untouched.
